description: Horizontal toolbar with a start section (title + child content) and an actions section. Supports sticky positioning to remain visible during scrolling.

parameters.name: Title
parameters.description: Optional title displayed at the start of the toolbar.

parameters.name: Actions
parameters.description: Content for the right/actions section of the toolbar.

parameters.name: Sticky
parameters.description: When true, the toolbar sticks to the top of its scroll container.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS class for the root element.

examples.title: Toolbar with title and action buttons
examples.code:
<TmToolbar Title="Orders">
    <Actions>
        <TmToolbarButton Text="Export" Icon="download" OnClick="@HandleExport" />
        <TmToolbarButton Text="New" Icon="plus" Variant="ButtonVariant.Primary" OnClick="@HandleNew" />
    </Actions>
</TmToolbar>
